allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Replace IsDeleted computed property with DeletedAt for EF Core translation

- Fixed critical EF Core translation issue where IsDeleted computed property could not be translated to SQL
- Replaced all 492 occurrences of IsDeleted with DeletedAt comparisons across 12 service files
- Updated local database connection string for development
- Disabled HTTPS redirection to work with both local and Railway environments

Changes:
- Program.cs: Commented out HTTPS redirection
- appsettings.json: Updated to use local PostgreSQL connection
- All Service files: Replaced !x.IsDeleted with x.DeletedAt == null

This fixes 500 errors on product endpoints and ensures all LINQ queries are translatable to SQL.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
